headline: Republic Services, Inc. Sets Date for First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
summary: Republic Services, Inc. (NYSE: RSG) will release its first quarter 2026 financial results after market close on Thursday, May 7, 2026, and host an investor conference call at 5 p.m. Eastern Time that day.
